zh.Edinburgh Castle, Edinburgh, Mid Lothian: 英國蘇格蘭米德洛迪安
zh.lifeSummary: 當Mael Muire Mac Donnchad Mormaer of Atholl於1037年出生在英國蘇格蘭培爾培斯時，他的父親Duncan I King of Scotland36歲，母親Suthen28歲。他於1068年之前與Mrs Mael Muir Mac Donnchad Mormaer結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他去世於1128年在英國英格蘭波藍德享年91歲。

zh-hans.Edinburgh Castle, Edinburgh, Mid Lothian: 英国苏格兰米德洛迪安
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Mael Muire Mac Donnchad Mormaer of Atholl于1037年出生在英国苏格兰培爾培斯时，他的父亲Duncan I King of Scotland36岁，母亲Suthen28岁。他于1068年之前与Mrs Mael Muir Mac Donnchad Mormaer结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。他去世于1128年在英国英格兰波藍德享年91岁。

nameMeanings.name: Mael
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a nickname from the Old French vocabulary word amabel, amable ‘lovely’ (akin to modern English amiable ‘friendly, good-humoured’). The initial vowel began to be lost as early as the 12th century (the same woman is referred to as both Mabilia and Amabilia in a document of 1185 ), but a short vowel in the resulting first syllable was standard, giving a rhyme with babble, until the 19th century, when people began to pronounce the name to rhyme with table.

nameMeanings.name: Muire
meanings: In Scripture, the Gaelic form of Mary. The other forms are Moire and Mairi.

nameMeanings.name: Mac
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   Mark  , now also quite popular in the English-speaking world. It was given some currency in England in the 1960s by the pop singer  Marc Bolan  (  1947–77 ).

variants.name: Mark
meanings: From the Latin name Marcus , borne by the Evangelist, author of the second gospel in the New Testament, and by several other early and medieval saints. In Arthurian legend, King Mark is the aged ruler of Cornwall to whom Isolde is brought as a bride by Tristan; his name was presumably of Celtic origin, perhaps derived from the element march ‘horse’. This was not a particularly common name in the Middle Ages but was in more frequent use by the end of the 16th century.

nameMeanings.name: Donnchad
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Gaelic: compound of Old Celtic donn ‘brown’ + chadh ‘chief’ or ‘noble’.

variants.name: Duncan
meanings: Anglicized form of the Gaelic name Donnchadh , also used among people without Scottish connections. This was the name of a 7th-century Scottish saint (abbot of Iona) and two medieval kings of Scotland. The final ‐n in the Anglicized form seems to be the result of confusion with the Gaelic word ceann ‘head’ in the Latinized form Duncanus. Compare Irish Donagh .

en.lifeSummary: When Mael Muire Mac Donnchad Mormaer of Atholl was born in 1037, in Perth, Perthshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, his father, Duncan I King of Scotland, was 36 and his mother, Suthen, was 28. He married Mrs Mael Muir Mac Donnchad Mormaer before 1068. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He died in 1128, in Cumberland, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 91.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mael Muire Mac Donnchad Mormaer of Atholl est né en 1037, à Perth, Perthshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Duncan I King of Scotland, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Suthen, avait 28 ans. Il a épousé Mrs Mael Muir Mac Donnchad Mormaer avant 1068. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Il est décédé en 1128, à Cumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 91 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Mael Muire Mac Donnchad Mormaer of Atholl 1037 in Perth, Perthshire, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Duncan I King of Scotland 36 und seine Mutter Suthen 28. Er hat vor 1068 Mrs Mael Muir Mac Donnchad Mormaer geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Er starb 1128 im Alter von 91 Jahren in Cumberland, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Mael Muire Mac Donnchad Mormaer of Atholl è nato il nel 1037 nel Perth, Perthshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Duncan I King of Scotland, aveva 36 anni e il suo madre, Suthen, aveva 28 anni. Lui sposato Mrs Mael Muir Mac Donnchad Mormaer prima del 1068. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì nel 1128, nel Cumberland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 91 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Mael Muire Mac Donnchad Mormaer of Athollが1037年にイギリススコットランドペルスシュアイアペルスで生まれた時，父Duncan I King of Scotlandは36歳，母Suthenは28歳であった。1068年以前にMrs Mael Muir Mac Donnchad Mormaerと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼は1128年にイギリスイギリスクウンバーランドで91歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Mael Muire Mac Donnchad Mormaer of Atholl(이)가 1037년 영국 스코틀랜드 퍼스실르 퍼스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Duncan I King of Scotland(은)는 36세였고, 그의 어머니 Suthen(은)는 28세였다. 그는 1068년 이전 Mrs Mael Muir Mac Donnchad Mormaer(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1128년 영국 잉글랜드 쿠벌랜드에서 91세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Perth, Perthshire, Scotland: Perth, Siorrachd Pheairt, Шотланд, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Mael Muire Mac Donnchad Mormaer of Atholl nasceu em 1037, em Perth, Perthshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, Duncan I King of Scotland, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Suthen, tinha 28 anos. Ele casou-se com Mrs Mael Muir Mac Donnchad Mormaer antes 1068. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ele faleceu em 1128, em Cumberland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 91 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mael Muire Mac Donnchad Mormaer of Atholl родился в 1037 г. в местности пирт, пиртшир, Шотландия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Duncan I King of Scotland было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Suthen, 28. Он женился на женщине по имени Mrs Mael Muir Mac Donnchad Mormaer перед 1068 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Он умер в 1128 г. в местности кумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 91 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Mael Muire Mac Donnchad Mormaer of Atholl nació en 1037, en Perth, Perthshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, su papá, Duncan I King of Scotland, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Suthen, tenía 28 años. Se casó con Mrs Mael Muir Mac Donnchad Mormaer antes de 1068. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió en 1128, en Cumberland, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 91 años.
